reason: jest + ts-jest boundary-mocking for an onCall agentic flow: mock OpenAI chat.completions.create to script tool_calls across rounds, mock Firestore. Required cases: normal agentic assign, single-member shortcut (no OpenAI call), no-member throw, task-already-done throw, 5-round fallback, reassign counter +1/-1.
Verify v2-only, region asia-east1, no forbidden patterns, and that function-calling uses chat.completions.create (not the parse path).

Verify counters use FieldValue.increment (Rule A), the assigneeId write + counters happen inside runTransaction (Rule B), reassign decrements the old assignee, and searchMemberCommits findNearest carries the repoId prefilter.
Verify HttpsError codes on pre-checks (failed-precondition for no-members / task-done) and that the flow returns {assigneeId, reasoning} matching AssignmentDecisionSchema.
